title: Multi-level authz: on_mount + scope + per-event
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/admin_users_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.AdminUsersLive). Required: (1) on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_authenticated}, (2) on_mount {MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :ensure_admin}, (3) mount assigns :scope as %MyApp.Scope{user: current_user}, (4) handle_params calls MyApp.Accounts.list_users(scope) which is scope-aware, (5) handle_event("promote", %{"id" => id}, socket) re-checks admin role AND verifies the target user is in the admin's org. Three layers of defense.
tier_rationale: Three-layer security with scope-aware queries. Full Phoenix 1.8+ pattern.
